name: Chicken with Apples and Radicchio
recipeInstructions: Heat olive oil in a skillet or electric fry pan over medium-high heat. Brown the chicken pieces, then remove them from the pan and set aside. Add shallots and cook for about 20 minutes until softened. Return the chicken to the pan and add radicchio and apple cider. Simmer until the apples are tender and there is about half a cup of liquid remaining in the skillet. Mix cornstarch with the remaining cider until smooth, then stir into the pan.
